message.text:
Code Clone

Reason: Identical or near-identical code blocks found in multiple locations. This violates the DRY (Don't Repeat Yourself) principle.

Recommendations:
Extract the duplicated code into a shared function, class, or module

Unused Class Method detected

Reason: The symbol is defined but not imported by any other file or used locally.

Recommendations:
Remove the unused symbol if it is truly no longer needed
Check if it should be an internal helper or if it was meant to be exported and used

Vendor Coupling: `vitest`

Reason: Direct usage of a third-party package in many files. This makes it difficult to replace the vendor library in the future.

Recommendations:
Create a wrapper or abstraction layer around the library

Unused file detected

Reason: This file is not imported by any other module in the codebase. It may be leftover code from refactoring, experimental code that was never integrated, or a genuinely unused module.

Recommendations:
Verify the file is truly unused (check dynamic imports, tests, configs)
Remove the file if confirmed as dead code
If keeping for reference, move to an archive or documentation
Add the file to entry_points config if it's an intentional entry point
Review recent refactorings to understand why it became unused

Orphan Type `DingTalkMessageData` detected

Reason: The type or interface is exported but never used by any other module in the codebase.

Recommendations:
Remove the unused type or interface

Function `computeDimensionStats` has high cognitive complexity (20)

Reason: High cognitive complexity indicates that the function is difficult to understand and maintain due to complex logic and deep nesting.

Recommendations:
Extract nested blocks into well-named helper functions
Use early returns (guard clauses) to flatten the code
Simplify complex boolean expressions
Replace nested if/else with polymorphism or a lookup table
Break down large loops into smaller processing steps

Function `StreamMessageService.processStreamMessage` has high cognitive complexity (19)

Reason: High cognitive complexity indicates that the function is difficult to understand and maintain due to complex logic and deep nesting.

Recommendations:
Extract nested blocks into well-named helper functions
Use early returns (guard clauses) to flatten the code
Simplify complex boolean expressions
Replace nested if/else with polymorphism or a lookup table
Break down large loops into smaller processing steps
